what: shinyglass • Liquid Glass themes for Shiny
title: shinyglass • Liquid Glass themes for Shiny
text: Apple-inspired Liquid Glass themes Shiny. One function — glass_theme() — app gets translucent surfaces, backdrop blur, soft depth, system typography. Built bslib, works fluidPage(), navbarPage(), page_sidebar(), Bootstrap-aware layouts. Documentation · Source · Issues

title: shinyglass • Liquid Glass themes for Shiny
text: Drop-theme — pass theme = glass_theme() Shiny page function accepts bslib theme Light dark presets — full color systems, just inverted text Familiar Shiny UI — standard inputs, buttons, navbars, sidebars, cards, DataTables pick glass styling automatically Works bslib — optional cards, value boxes, page_sidebar() dashboards Tunable — accent color, blur, saturation, corner radius

title: shinyglass • Liquid Glass themes for Shiny
shinyglass • Liquid Glass themes for Shiny
text: need shiny shinyglass. glass_theme() returns bslib theme object Shiny page functions understand — need load bslib unless want UI helpers (card(), page_fillable(), ).
code: library(shiny) library(shinyglass)  ui <- fluidPage(   theme = glass_theme(),   titlePanel("Liquid Glass"),   selectInput("color", "Favorite color", c("Blue", "Purple", "Orange")),   sliderInput("n", "Number of bars", 5, 30, 15),   plotOutput("plot") )  server <- function(input, output, session) {   output$plot <- renderPlot({     barplot(       seq_len(input$n),       col = "#007AFF",       border = NA,       main = paste("You chose", input$color)     )   }) }  shinyApp(ui, server)

title: shinyglass • Liquid Glass themes for Shiny
code: glass_theme(   preset     = "dark",   # "light" or "dark"   primary    = "#007AFF",   blur       = 28,   saturation = 200,   radius     = "1.25rem" )

shinyglass • Liquid Glass themes for Shiny
text: Glass themes applied open dashboards dreamRs — GitHub stats, Olympic medals, French births, Paris metro traffic:
code: install.packages(c(   "shinyWidgets", "ggplot2", "reactable", "apexcharter",   "leaflet", "sf", "billboarder", "shinydashboard" )) shiny::runApp(system.file("examples", "dreamrs-gh-dashboard.R", package = "shinyglass")) shiny::runApp(system.file("examples", "dreamrs-olympic-medals.R", package = "shinyglass")) shiny::runApp(system.file("examples", "dreamrs-tdb-naissances.R", package = "shinyglass")) shiny::runApp(system.file("examples", "dreamrs-ratp-traffic.R", package = "shinyglass"))

title: shinyglass • Liquid Glass themes for Shiny

what: Apple Liquid Glass theme for Shiny — glass_theme
title: Apple Liquid Glass theme for Shiny — glass_theme
text: Create bslib::bs_theme() styled Apple-inspired Liquid Glass look: translucent surfaces, backdrop blur, soft depth, system typography. Pass result theme = fluidPage(), navbarPage(), bslib::page_sidebar(), page function accepts bslib theme.

title: Apple Liquid Glass theme for Shiny — glass_theme
code: glass_theme(   preset = c("light", "dark"),   primary = "#007AFF",   blur = 28,   saturation = 200,   radius = "1.25rem",   ... )

title: Apple Liquid Glass theme for Shiny — glass_theme
text: preset "light" "dark". Switches full color system. primary Accent color buttons, links, focus rings. Defaults Apple system blue (#007AFF). blur Backdrop blur radius pixels. saturation Backdrop saturation percentage. radius Default border radius glass surfaces (CSS length). ... Additional arguments forwarded bslib::bs_theme().

title: Apple Liquid Glass theme for Shiny — glass_theme
text: bslib::bs_theme() object suitable Shiny page functions.

title: Apple Liquid Glass theme for Shiny — glass_theme
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(shiny) library(shinyglass)  ui <- fluidPage(   theme = glass_theme(),   titlePanel("Liquid Glass"),   selectInput("color", "Color", c("Blue", "Purple", "Orange")),   plotOutput("plot") )  # Dark preset with a custom accent ui <- fluidPage(   theme = glass_theme(preset = "dark", primary = "#BF5AF2"),   titlePanel("Dark glass") ) } # }

title: shinyglass (development version)
text: Refresh README pkgdown site end users: feature list, clearer examples, developer-testing notes. Add tier /B visual coverage: SuperZIP (leaflet), shinyWidgets gallery, bs4Dash AdminLTE3 demo, chromote capture script inst/scripts/visual-test-tier-ab.R example launchers. Fix replace_page_theme() complex nested theme = expressions (needed glass-wrap shinyWidgets gallery). Fix overlapping glass frames multi-column layouts (e.g. dreamRs gh-dashboard avatar + statiCards): clip plot/html outputs surfaces, constrain flex columns, ellipsize long avatar text.

title: shinyglass 0.1.0
text: Initial release. glass_theme() returns ‘bslib’ theme Apple-inspired Liquid Glass styling ‘shiny’ applications.
